questions.question: What happens when Vue renders a list without a `:key` and an item is removed?
options: Vue removes the correct DOM node by matching content
Vue updates items by position, potentially mismatching state
Vue re-renders the entire list from scratch

questions.question: When is it acceptable to use the array index as `:key`?
options: Always: the index is the most performant key
When the list is static, never reordered, and items have no internal state
When items are objects with complex nested data
When the list has more than 100 items

questions.question: What type must `:key` values be in Vue?
